name: sore throat
title: best herbal teas for sore throat
description: Lavandula angustifolia tea contains bioactive constituents such as linalool and linalyl acetate, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to soothe and calm a sore throat. The calming properties of this herbal tea make it an effective remedy for relieving throat pain and discomfort, while its antimicrobial properties help to combat infections that can exacerbate the condition.
